description: Dest pipeline for m_26_14-dataset-retention transform. Computes the empirical searchable horizon (horizon_days = ingest_time - min(@timestamp)) for each data_stream.dataset and sets the dataset field for enrich matching. Replaces ILM/tier/snapshot introspection with a measured quantity: how far back can we actually search? The snapshot/retrievable axis is dropped (decision #22); both s_days and r_days are set to horizon_days in downstream ladder math.

set.description: Flatten nested data_stream.dataset to top-level for enrich matching

script.description: Compute horizon_days from first_log (min @timestamp) to now
script.source: long nowMs = new Date().getTime(); if (ctx.first_log == null) { ctx.horizon_days = 0.0; } else { long firstMs; if (ctx.first_log instanceof String) { firstMs = ZonedDateTime.parse(ctx.first_log).toInstant().toEpochMilli(); } else if (ctx.first_log instanceof Number) { firstMs = ((Number) ctx.first_log).longValue(); } else { firstMs = ZonedDateTime.parse(ctx.first_log.toString()).toInstant().toEpochMilli(); } ctx.horizon_days = (double)(nowMs - firstMs) / 86400000.0; }

script.description: Stamp write-time @timestamp (transform dest pipelines do not populate ctx._ingest)
